options: The recommended approach where you provide signals as a suggestion and Meta finds who converts
questions.explanation: Advantage+ Audience uses your audiences as a suggestion, not a hard limit; it looks for conversions beyond them.

questions.q: A custom audience is built with:
options: People with a prior relationship to the business (website, app, list, engagement)
questions.explanation: Custom audience = your people: visitors, app users, customer list, or those who engaged.

options: 1% more similar/precise and less reach; 10% more reach and less similar
questions.explanation: 1% is the closest match to the seed (precise, low reach); 10% expands but dilutes the similarity.

questions.q: Typical symptom of over-targeting (audience too small):
options: Almost no delivery and high CPM
questions.explanation: A tiny audience = the system can't optimize; cost goes up and delivery drops.

questions.q: A client in a regulated sector that may NOT show ads outside an audience defined by law:
questions.explanation: A hard legal restriction = strict control: original audience. Advantage+ treats signals as a suggestion and can expand.
